hitchens_question: Why is it that the same Western governments who express such theatrical concern over Russian drone fragments hitting a Romanian apartment block maintain such studied silence about their own precision-guided munitions routinely demolishing entire neighborhoods in places like Southern Lebanon and Mali? Are we to believe that sovereignty and civilian lives matter more when they can be instrumentalized against Moscow than when they might inconvenience our own geopolitical projects? The moral arithmetic here is either grotesquely cynical or breathtakingly stupid—and I'm not sure which possibility is more damning.
